name: CallbackTPDataIndication
title: CallbackTPDataIndication
syntax: long CallbackTPDataIndication( dword timeStart, dword timeFinish, WORD channel, dword CanIdTx, dword additionalTx, dword CanIdRx, BYTE data[], char source[], char target[])
long CallbackTPDataIndication( dword timeStart, dword timeFinish, WORD channel, dword CanIdTx, dword additionalTx, dword CanIdRx, BYTE data[])
description: Indicates the transmission of an ISO TP data packet on a CAN channel where the ISO TP Observer is configured to supervise the communication.

parameters.name: timeStart, timeFinish
parameters.description: Start and end of data transmission (resolution: 10µs).

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: CAN channel the transmission took place on.

parameters.name: CanIdTx
parameters.description: CAN id used by the sending node.

parameters.name: CanIdRx
parameters.description: CAN id configured for FlowControl frames for this transmission.

parameters.name: source, target
parameters.description: Names of the source and target nodes, also displayed in the Trace Window events.

description: See Filter Diagnostic Objects using CAPL Filter in the Measurement Setup

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
